license.title: Activate Software
license.subtitle.locked: This PC is not activated. Send the machine code below to the seller to unlock the app on this device.
license.subtitle.expired: This device's license has expired. Send the machine code to the seller to renew.
license.instructions: Send this code to the seller via WhatsApp or phone. They will send back a license.key file (USB is easiest) or a shorter activation code.
license.filePreferred: No internet needed: copy license.key to a USB stick, then choose the file below.
license.orDrop: or drag & drop the file here
license.success.title: Activated successfully
license.error.wrong_machine: This license belongs to another device and will not work on this PC.
license.error.clock_rollback: A change in the system clock was detected. Please set the correct date and time.
license.error.invalid: Invalid activation code. Make sure you copied all of it.
license.error.hardware: Could not read the machine ID. Restart the app; if the problem persists, contact the seller.
license.error.file: Could not read the selected file.
license.error.empty: Please enter an activation code or choose a file.
license.error.generic: Activation failed. Try again or contact the seller.
app.title: ElHegazi Retailer
reports_subtitle: Select a report, then choose the appropriate run mode.
reports_select_hint: Select a report to see control actions.
reports_invalid_range: Start date must be before or equal to end date.
reports_live_data: This report uses live data and does not require a date range.
r01_desc: Daily sales with costs, profits, and returns totals.
r02_desc: All invoices with customer, cashier, and item count.
r03_desc: Best-selling items by quantity, revenue, and margin.
r04_desc: Sales distribution across categories with profits.
r05_desc: User performance by sales, invoice count, and returns.
r06_desc: Invoices grouped by payment method with discounts and returns.
r07_desc: Peak distribution by day and hour.
r08_desc: Invoices with high discounts or unusual states.
r09_desc: Compare sales summary between two time periods.
r10_desc: Items with no sales during the period with stock value.
r11_desc: Current stock with reorder limits and status.
r12_desc: Stock movement details with before/after quantities.
r13_desc: Current inventory valuation by WACC method.
r14_desc: Item list for physical counting with barcode and warehouse.
r20_desc: Comprehensive revenue, costs, expenses, and net profit.
r21_desc: Cash inflows and outflows with running balance.
r22_desc: Treasury and bank balances with transaction counts.
r24_desc: Customer invoices and payments with running balance.
r25_desc: Highest spending customers with contact and loyalty info.
r27_desc: Shift totals and expected cash variances.
r28_desc: Activity log with advanced filtering and details.
r29_desc: Gross and net sales after discounts and returns with profit.
r30_desc: Sales return details and inventory impact.
r31_desc: Discount analysis by range and payment method.
r32_desc: Profit margin analysis per item with selectable cost method.
r33_desc: Profit margin analysis per category with selectable cost method.
r34_desc: Purchase totals by date with supplier count.
r35_desc: Purchase order details with creator and item count.
r36_desc: Purchases grouped by supplier with returns.
r37_desc: Most purchased items with average cost.
r38_desc: Purchase return details with refund method.
r40_desc: Inventory age analysis by last movement date.
r41_desc: Items with no movement for extended periods.
r43_desc: Supplier purchase history with running balance.
r44_desc: Shift cash matching with expected vs actual.
r45_desc: Payment flow analysis by method with running total.
r66_desc: Total in, total out, and net amount for each payment method in a selected period.
r67_desc: Detailed movements filterable by method, direction, document type, party type, and amount.
r68_desc: Group payment inflows and outflows by source document type.
r69_desc: Compare total inflows, outflows, and net movement for the period.
r70_desc: Running ledger showing the effect of each movement on each payment method.
r46_desc: Balance distribution between banks and treasuries.
r47_desc: Shift settlement variances and accounting issues.
r48_desc: Sales VAT due with invoice count.
r49_desc: Recoverable purchase VAT with supplier count.
r50_desc: Comprehensive VAT period summary with net VAT.
invoice_note_placeholder: Add a note to the invoice…
features.banner: Disabling a feature does not delete its data — it only hides from the UI and returns fully when re-enabled.
features.gotoSettings: You can enable this feature from Settings → Features

feature_variants.name: Variants (Sizes & Colors)

feature_gold.name: Gold & Jewelry Pricing
updates.download_confirm_desc: A new system version will be downloaded and installed. Please read the warnings below before proceeding.
updates.download_step_save: Save all your open work — the system will restart after installation.
updates.download_step_close: Make sure to close any other windows (reports, open invoices).
updates.download_step_network: Ensure internet connectivity — additional data may need to be downloaded.
updates.download_step_restart: After installation, the system will restart automatically.
updates.download_confirm_checkbox: I confirm that I have saved my work and wish to proceed
updates.install_confirm_desc: The update will be installed and the system will restart immediately. This action cannot be undone.
updates.install_step_save: Ensure all pending transactions are saved (invoices, vouchers).
updates.install_step_close_app: The application will close completely and reopen.
updates.install_step_duration: Installation may take a few minutes — do not turn off your device.
updates.install_step_auto_launch: Once complete, the program will open automatically and everything will be up to date.
updates.install_confirm_checkbox: I confirm that I am ready to restart the system
updates.in_progress_desc: The update process is running. Please wait for it to complete — do not close the program or turn off your device.
serverDown.transient.title: Connection to the app lost
serverDown.transient.body: The internal server stopped responding. Retrying automatically — please don't close the app.
serverDown.restarting.title: Restarting the server...
serverDown.restarting.body: An error was detected and the internal server is restarting automatically. Please wait.
serverDown.offline.title: Network connection lost
serverDown.offline.body: The device appears to be offline. Check your connection and it will resume automatically.
serverDown.dbEperm.title: Can't access app files
serverDown.dbEperm.body: The app doesn't have permission to write to the data folder. Run the app as administrator, or move it out of the Program Files folder.
serverDown.dbLocked.title: Database is busy
serverDown.dbLocked.body: The database file is open by another copy of the app or another program. Close any other instance, then press Retry.
serverDown.dbCorrupt.title: Database is corrupted
serverDown.dbCorrupt.body: Couldn't open a healthy database. Use the Backup page to restore a healthy copy.
serverDown.portExhausted.title: Ports are busy
serverDown.portExhausted.body: All ports available to the app are in use by other programs. Close the conflicting programs, then press Retry.
serverDown.loopbackBlocked.title: Local connection blocked
serverDown.loopbackBlocked.body: Your antivirus or proxy settings seem to block the local connection (127.0.0.1). Add the app to your antivirus exceptions list.
serverDown.nativeModule.title: Internal component missing
serverDown.nativeModule.body: Couldn't load the database component. You may need to install the Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable, or reinstall the app.
serverDown.fatal.title: Server failed to start
serverDown.fatal.body: The internal server couldn't start after several attempts. Try Diagnose & Fix below, or restart the app.
serverDown.persistentHint: If the problem persists, copy the report and send it to support.
serverDown.transientHint: If the problem persists, close and reopen the app.
rootError.title: An error occurred in the app
rootError.body: An unexpected error stopped the interface. Reload the app to continue — your data is safe.

sync.title: E-commerce Sync
sync.name: Name
sync.noChanges: No new changes from the online store
sync.noPending: No pending changes in the store
sync.notConfiguredHint: Configure the connection to the online store to start syncing products and inventory
sync.config.title: Sync Settings
sync.config.apiKeyHint: Leave empty to keep the current key
sync.config.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
sync.config.connectedMsg: Connection to the online store is working
sync.config.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to the online store
sync.branding.heading:
Connect Your Store
to Your POS System
sync.branding.subtitle: Two-way sync between your online store and POS — products, inventory, prices, and images. Full control over what and when to sync.
sync.branding.feature1Desc: Connect your online store to your POS system — products, inventory, prices, and images in both directions
sync.branding.feature2Desc: Hundreds of products with multiple images each, automatic or manual sync as needed
sync.branding.feature3Desc: Choose to import all product images or one by one with full preview before syncing
sync.branding.feature4Desc: As soon as a product sells in-store, inventory updates on your website automatically
sync.branding.feature5Desc: Encrypted connection with unique API keys per branch, with full sync audit log
sync.branding.feature6Desc: Choose which fields to sync — price only? stock only? or everything together
sync.market.heroTitle: Grow your business with an online store
sync.market.heroSubtitle: A professional online store running around the clock, synced directly with your POS app — products, images, prices and stock in one place, with orders arriving instantly to turn into invoices.
sync.market.webSubtitle: What you get when you add an online store to your business
sync.market.web1Desc: Showcase your products on a professional site that runs 24/7 with no technical skills
sync.market.web2Desc: Add and edit products from the site dashboard — names, prices, stock and images
sync.market.web3Desc: Upload multiple images per product for an attractive, professional display
sync.market.web4Desc: Add prices, offers and discounts directly on your online store
sync.market.syncSubtitle: Extra features when you link the store to the app
sync.market.sync1Desc: Link your online store to the POS — products, stock, prices and images in both directions
sync.market.sync2Desc: The moment a product sells, stock updates on your online store automatically — no conflicts or errors
sync.market.sync3Desc: Online store orders appear right in the app to review and turn into a sales invoice in one tap
sync.market.sync4Desc: Track every synced change with the ability to roll back to any previous version in one click
sync.market.bottomDesc: Add your online store and link it to your POS in minutes. Our support team is ready to help around the clock.
sync.market.aboutTitle: A professional online store that works for you around the clock
sync.market.aboutBody: Your online store is your storefront on the internet — it shows your products with their images and prices, takes orders from customers anytime and anywhere, then sends them straight to your POS to turn into invoices with one tap. Everything you sell in-store updates automatically online, and vice versa. No technical skills needed — you run it all from one simple dashboard.
sync.market.aboutPoint1: An attractive storefront that works on mobile and desktop
sync.market.aboutPoint2: Take online orders and turn them into POS invoices
sync.market.aboutPoint3: Automatic sync of products, images, prices and stock
sync.market.aboutPoint4: A full dashboard: reports, customers, and order management
sync.market.showcaseTitle: A glimpse of your online store
sync.market.showcaseSubtitle: This is how your store looks to your customers
sync.market.shotHint: Sample image — replace it with a shot of your store
sync.market.videoTitle: See how your online store works
sync.market.videoSubtitle: A quick one-minute tour of the online store and POS sync
sync.market.videoHint: The online store intro video will appear here
sync.config.step1: Pull products, prices, and inventory from your online store
sync.config.step2: Push stock and price changes from POS to your website
sync.config.step3: Choose which fields to sync — price, stock, or both
sync.config.step4: Preview multiple product images and select which to import
sync.config.connectionSubtitle: Connect your online store to your POS
sync.config.editSubtitle: Already configured — edit settings or test connection
sync.review.title: Review Changes
sync.review.subtitle: %d products to review before syncing
sync.review.noFields: All selected products have no enabled fields
sync.review.name: Name
sync.impact.title: Impact Summary
sync.page.whySyncDesc: Sync connects your online store to your POS — ensuring inventory, prices, and products update automatically without manual work.
sync.page.benefit1Desc: When a product sells, inventory updates on your website instantly — no manual lists, no errors.
sync.page.benefit2Desc: Pull new products and images from your online store in one click. Choose what to import.
sync.page.benefit3Desc: New orders from the website appear directly in the POS — fulfill them without delay.
sync.page.conflict.noConflictsDesc: All product conflicts have been resolved
sync.page.fields.name: Name
sync.dashboard.title: E-commerce Sync
sync.page.empty.available.title: Start pulling products
sync.page.empty.available.desc: No products pulled yet. Search and select products to sync from your online store.
sync.page.empty.new.title: No new products
sync.page.empty.new.desc: No new products found on your online store. Add products to your store first.
sync.page.empty.pending.title: All up to date!
sync.page.empty.pending.desc: No pending changes — all data is synced between the store and the website.
sync.page.empty.logs.title: No sync logs yet
sync.page.empty.logs.desc: Once sync starts with the online store, operation logs will appear here for tracking.
sync.config.wizard.title: Sync Setup
sync.config.wizard.subtitle: Connect your online store to your POS in 4 easy steps
sync.config.wizard.welcome.title: What is E-commerce Sync?
sync.config.wizard.welcome.description: Sync connects your online store to your POS system. Changes in either one automatically reflect on the other — products, prices, stock, and images.
sync.config.wizard.requirements.title: What You Need
sync.config.wizard.requirements.subtitle: Make sure you have these from your online store admin panel
A unique identifier for your store in the sync system
Find it in: site admin → Sync → Manage Stores
sync.config.wizard.requirements.apiKey.d: A secret key that securely links your POS to your online store
sync.config.wizard.requirements.apiKey.h: Create it from: site admin → Sync → Manage Stores → Create store (shown once)
sync.config.wizard.requirements.apiKey.w: The key is shown only once — save it in a safe place!
sync.config.wizard.requirements.internet: Make sure your device is connected to the internet
No internet connection — check your network and try again
sync.config.wizard.requirements.instruct: Click each item below to confirm it's ready
All 3 items must be confirmed to unlock the Next button
sync.config.wizard.requirements.allSet: All requirements are ready! You may proceed
sync.config.wizard.connect.title: Connect Your Store
sync.config.wizard.connect.subtitle: Enter the information you prepared in the previous step
sync.config.wizard.connect.ecomUrl.label: Online store URL
sync.config.wizard.connect.ecomUrl.hint: Your online store's full web address — exactly as it appears in your browser (e.g. https://yourstore.vercel.app)
sync.config.wizard.connect.ecomUrl.inval: Enter a full URL starting with https://
sync.config.wizard.connect.storeId.label: Store ID
sync.config.wizard.connect.storeId.hint: Your unique store ID — copy it from: site admin → Sync → Manage Stores
sync.config.wizard.connect.storeId.inval: Paste the Store ID exactly as shown in the admin panel
sync.config.wizard.connect.apiKey.label: API Key
sync.config.wizard.connect.apiKey.placeh: Paste your secret API key here
sync.config.wizard.connect.apiKey.hint: The secret key — create it from: site admin → Sync → Manage Stores → Create store (shown once)
sync.config.wizard.connect.apiKey.invali: API key is too short — paste the full key exactly as you copied it
sync.config.wizard.connect.storeName.hin: A friendly name to identify this connection later
sync.config.wizard.connect.trustBar: SSL Encrypted • Secure Server • Auto Backup
sync.config.wizard.connect.guide.title: Where do I find this?
sync.config.wizard.connect.guide.subtitl: Follow these steps in your online store's admin panel
sync.config.wizard.connect.guide.step1: Open your online store's admin panel in the browser and sign in as admin
sync.config.wizard.connect.guide.step2: From the side menu choose: "Sync" → "Manage Stores"
sync.config.wizard.connect.guide.step3: Click "Create store", then copy the "Store ID" and the "API Key"
sync.config.wizard.connect.guide.step4: Paste your store URL, Store ID and API Key into the fields below
sync.config.wizard.connect.guide.warn: The API key is shown only once when created — copy and save it immediately before closing the dialog
sync.config.wizard.test.success.title: Connected Successfully!
sync.config.wizard.test.success.desc: Your online store is now connected to your POS system
sync.config.wizard.test.failure.title: Connection Failed
sync.config.wizard.test.failure.desc: Could not connect to the online store. Check your info and try again.
sync.config.wizard.test.failure.fix.url: URL is correct and starts with https://
sync.config.wizard.test.failure.fix.key: Store ID and API Key are correct
sync.config.wizard.test.failure.fix.stor: Store is active in admin panel (not suspended)
sync.config.wizard.test.failure.fix.inte: Device is connected and the online store is accessible
sync.config.wizard.info.title: Two-Way Sync — How It Works
sync.config.wizard.info.desc: After setup, you can pull products and prices from your site to POS, and push stock and price changes from POS to your site. You can choose which fields to sync per product.
sync.rollback.title: Rollback
sync.rollback.subtitle: Undo any previous sync operation
sync.rollback.warning: Warning: {count} new products will be deleted
sync.rollback.noSnapshotsDesc: After the first sync, a snapshot will appear here
sync.rollback.emptyDesc: No rollbacks have been performed yet
sync.webhook.title: Webhook
sync.webhook.config.title: Webhook Settings
sync.webhook.config.subtitle: Receive orders from the online store in real-time
sync.webhook.testHint: Send a test request to verify settings
sync.webhook.registerHint: Notify the online store of your webhook URL
sync.scheduling.title: Auto Sync
sync.review.missingPrices: Purchase price and sale price are required for new products (wholesale is optional)
telegram.title: Telegram Notifications
telegram.subtitle: Instant owner alerts for the most important system events
telegram.step1Hint: From @BotFather and your personal Telegram account
telegram.step4Hint: Send a test message to verify the connection
telegram.toggleImportantActionsHint: Large discounts, returns, payments, low stock, backup results, failed login attempts
telegram.toggleSystemHint: Backup results and failed login attempts
telegram.digestsHint: Automatic analytics reports: sales, profit, top products & customers, cash and debts. Delivered on app launch if the scheduled time was missed.
telegram.easyConnectTitle: Easy connect — scan with your phone
telegram.easyConnectHint: After pasting the token, tap Generate connect code, then scan it with your phone camera and tap Start inside the bot — it links automatically.
telegram.scanHint: Scan with your phone camera — the bot opens, tap Start
telegram.groupHint: For groups: add the bot to the group and send any message before scanning
telegram.fallbackLink: Or open the link on this device
telegram.scanConnected: Linked successfully — save settings to activate
telegram.qrError: Couldn't generate the connect code — check the token
telegram.detectHint: Fetches the Chat ID from the bot's last message
telegram.detectFoundNoName: Chat ID found and filled in
telegram.detectError: Couldn't fetch Chat ID — check the Bot Token and that you've started a chat with the bot
telegram.guideTitle: How do I get the credentials?
telegram.guideStep1: 1. Open Telegram, search for @BotFather, send /newbot and follow the steps to get a Bot Token.
telegram.guideStep2: 2. Find your bot and start a conversation (press Start).
telegram.guideStep3: 3. Open https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates in a browser and copy the chat.id value from the latest message.
telegram.guideStep4: 4. Paste the credentials here and press Send Test to verify.
telegram.testSuccess: Did it arrive? ✓ Test message sent successfully
telegram.validation: Enter Bot Token and Chat ID first
telegram.ready: Notifications are ready — you will receive Telegram alerts for new invoices, daily close, and important events.
telegram.steps: Open Telegram, search for @BotFather (blue checkmark), and start a chat|Send /newbot, choose a name, then a username ending in "bot"|Copy the Bot Token it gives you and paste it in the field above|Tap "Generate connect code" and scan it with your phone camera|Tap "Start" inside the bot — it links automatically
guide.phoneCue: Scanning is done from your phone while the app stays open on the computer
telegram.loadError: Activating Telegram requires an admin account with settings permission
messaging.channelsSubtitle: WhatsApp and SMS for customer communication — Telegram for owner alerts
wizard.whatsapp.title: Activate WhatsApp
wizard.whatsapp.subtitle: 3 simple steps from your phone
wizard.whatsapp.step1.caption: We'll generate a QR code on screen for you to scan with your phone camera, linking the store's WhatsApp number to the app.
wizard.whatsapp.step2.caption: Open WhatsApp on your phone: Settings → Linked Devices → Link a Device, then scan the code shown here.
wizard.whatsapp.step3.caption: Linked successfully! Customers will now automatically receive receipts and offers — no need to open your phone again.
wizard.telegram.title: Activate Telegram
wizard.telegram.subtitle: 5 steps — takes about two minutes
wizard.telegram.step1.caption: Open Telegram on your phone, search for BotFather (look for the blue verified badge next to the name), and start a chat with it.
wizard.telegram.step2.caption: Send /newbot. It will ask for a name — type anything — then a username that must end in "bot".
wizard.telegram.step3.caption: It will send you a message with a long code (Bot Token) — copy it and paste it in the field below.
wizard.telegram.step4.caption: Tap the button below to generate a code, scan it with your phone camera, then tap Start inside the bot.
wizard.telegram.step5.caption: Linked! You'll now get instant alerts for every invoice, daily closing, and important events.
whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: Free customer communication via the store's WhatsApp account
whatsapp.steps: Press Link WhatsApp to start a QR session|Open WhatsApp on your phone → Settings → Linked Devices|Scan the QR code on the screen|Use it to send receipts and marketing campaigns
whatsapp.waitingScan: Waiting for QR scan from your phone...
whatsapp.qrHint: Open WhatsApp → Settings → Linked Devices → Link a new device
whatsapp.qrRefreshing: The code refreshes automatically every few seconds.
whatsapp.errorHint: Check your internet connection. If it keeps failing, clear the WhatsApp session and try linking again.
whatsapp.connectedTags: Automatically send sales receipts to customers|Run marketing campaigns for subscribers|Replying 'Cancel' stops marketing messages|Up to 200 messages per day with safe spacing
whatsapp.noPhone: Add a customer phone number first
whatsapp.notConnected: WhatsApp is not connected — check connection first
whatsapp.waNotConnectedHint: You can copy the message or open WhatsApp manually. To send automatically, connect WhatsApp first from the message center.
whatsapp.waWaitingScanHint: Scan the QR code from your phone to enable auto-sending.
sms.title: SMS Messages
sms.desc: Paid channel that reaches any phone — customers don't need WhatsApp
sms.steps: Subscribe to an SMS provider (e.g. SMS Misr or Cequens) and get API URL and API key|Press Activate SMS and enter provider details|Send a test message to your number|Choose SMS channel when creating campaigns
sms.connectedTags: Send text messages to any phone number|Ideal for debt reminders and offers|Works even when the customer has no internet
telegram.channelDesc: Instant owner-only alerts — not sent to customers
telegram.info1: Messages are sent from the bot you create to your personal account only.
telegram.info2: If sending fails (no internet or Telegram is down), the message is stored in a local queue and retried every 2 minutes.
telegram.info3: Retries stop automatically after 10 attempts or 24 hours.
telegram.info4: Never share your Bot Token; anyone with it can send messages as the bot.
telegram.connectedTags: Instant alert for every new invoice|Daily closing summary on Telegram|All important event alerts in one place
telegram.eventsList: New sales invoice|Daily close and shift close|Large invoices and discounts|Sales returns|Cancelled invoices|New purchase orders/receipts|Customer payments|Low stock alert|Backup result|Failed login attempts
